title: Evangelion themed Buses in Hakone
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion-themed Buses in Hakone             Quote Post by riffraff11235 » Sun May 26, 2013 1:17 am “Eva” Itabus Appears at Hakone Tozan Bus’ 100th Anniversary Celebration Event Officially the only way to travel around Hakone.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sun May 26, 2013 3:55 am I wonder why Hakone would do that : I never saw a show mistreating so much the city were it take place, in every continuity Tokyo-3/Hakone ends up pulverized! On a side not, I just love how the Japanese make all these Evangelion 3.0 themed products and events, yet every character is in its 2.0 attire! Not a single trace of eyepatch Asuka, Kuronami, Captain Némo!Misato or the new plugsuits!

[]:             Quote Post by Veefy » Mon May 27, 2013 7:10 am picture as the link seems to be down..

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Tue May 28, 2013 12:52 pm ElMariachi wrote: On a side not, I just love how the Japanese make all these Evangelion 3.0 themed products and events, yet every character is in its 2.0 attire! Not a single trace of eyepatch Asuka, Kuronami, Captain Némo!Misato or the new plugsuits!

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue May 28, 2013 2:53 pm AR-99 wrote: Odd huh, since the movie is out on BD/DVD. Or the new appearances are too spoilerific?

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Tue May 28, 2013 3:14 pm ElMariachi wrote: Although I would have imagined some advertising with Sakura, I'm curious to see what she looks like outside of her uniform.

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Tue May 28, 2013 4:10 pm AR-99 wrote: I think a few people would like to see that. Sakura is too new though. Newtype June 2011 does have Asuka with the eyepatch holding the Spear of Cassius, that was spoiling already. Maybe something with the left side of her face shadowed or obscured.

[]:             Quote Post by AR-99 » Mon Jun 24, 2013 8:23 pm Toys of these are available, although they are small (4.0cm height, 14.5cm × 3.0cm for width and Length), with a weight of 302.5 g. [URL=http://imgur.com/zppNWTl] [/URL]
